element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Featured series in Masō Kishin storyline
First in series to feature this mechanic
Player-driven scenario selection affects plot progression

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Episodic tension via scenario-based structure with player agency in sequencing

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to tactical mechanics and unit roster
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating tactical complexity with branching scenarios
difficulty_curve.late_game: Masō Kishin narrative climax with advanced enemy forces
notable_spikes: Scenario selection consequences affecting difficulty progression

notable_level_patterns.description: Player selects order in which scenarios are undertaken, creating branching narrative and difficulty variations based on selection sequence
Grid-based combat scenarios featuring player-controlled robot units against enemy formations, supporting newly-introduced weapon upgrade mechanics

sources_used: wikipedia - List of Super Robot Wars video games
